nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Orange-fronted parakeet
nodes.summary: Orange-fronted parakeet may refer to: Eupsittula canicularis, also known as the orange-fronted conure, or half-moon conure, a species of bird from Central America Cyanoramphus malherbi, also known as Malherbe's parakeet, or kākāriki karaka, a species of bird from New Zealand
